text:
Created attachment 173025
PORTREVISION bumps for LIB_DEPENDS

Updated patch for PORTREVISION bumps after ports r418497 changes.

But according to ABI tracker, the 8.0 and 9.0 versions are backward compatible:
http://abi-laboratory.pro/tracker/objects_report/pulseaudio/8.0/8.99.1/report.html
http://abi-laboratory.pro/tracker/objects_report/pulseaudio/8.99.1/8.99.2/report.html
http://abi-laboratory.pro/tracker/objects_report/pulseaudio/8.99.2/9.0/report.html
